name: Juuza
description: Juza of the Clouds (雲のジュウザ, Kumo no Jūza) is the childhood rival of Raoh and a martial art prodigy who uses a self-styled martial art (我流の拳, Garyū no Ken) that suits his free-spirited personality. A childhood friend of Yuria, Juza fell in love with her as they grew up, but his hope of pursuing a relationship with her was shattered when he learned that they were half-siblings from the same father. Afterwards, Juza began living a care-free life of promiscuity, indifferent to the cause of the other

name: Karasuba
description: __Height__: 155 cm __Character Designer__: [Choco Fuji](https://anilist.co/staff/111381/Choco-Fuji) The leader doll at Kuronekotei. She is sometimes strict but is very caring of people around her. Her body parts are made from junk parts that Nagi found in order to repair her. Despite her parts being old and worn, she refuses to exchange her parts for new ones as she believes her body is a gift that Nagi gave to her.

name: Kokoro
description: Kokoro is the main conductor of the Sea Train, Puffing Tom, at the station just outside of Water 7. She has a granddaughter named Chimney, who accompanies her everywhere. ~!She is then later revealed to be a mermaid.!~

name: Kosuri Onigashira
description: Daughter of Keisuke and a fangirl of SOX who carries multiple weapons and uses tactics she learned from romantic and shoujo manga to manipulate everyone, even her allies. Ayame lets her join in partly because her hairstyle looks similar to the tip of a penis, however her loyalty is questionable, she can be very manipulative often uses her charm to seduce boys and everyone around her were she can also be very domineering when she has them in her grip. Currently pretending to be Tanukichi's sister

name: Kousuke Misaki
description: Second-year student and a captain of karate club. He's a cousin and childhood friend of Carol. He also has British roots. Really admires Tomo.

name: Kurenai
description: One of the strongest female warriors among the tankers in The Power. She spearheads her troop on the battlefields with her henchmen Sou and Ryu. Brave, but plenteous in mercy, she bundles her men together with her charisma. She is the object of [Natsume](https://anilist.co/character/170191/)'s long-time admiration. (Source: Official Site, edited)

name: Kuroumaru Tokisaka
description: Number 11 of UQ Holder's immortal squad, Numbers. A 14 year old who comes from a tribe of demi-humans (Yatagarasu) where children are born genderless, but can choose to become male or female during a ceremony on their 16th birthday. Kuroumaru currently wants to become male, and thus identifies as and presents himself as a boy. He has romantic feelings for Touta, but denies it to everyone who points it out, claiming he only wants "male friendship" with Touta. He is a practitioner of the Shinmeiry

name: Loly Aivirrne
description: Loly is a teenage, female arrancar who, along with Menoly, was ordered to bring Orihime to Aizen when he wanted to show her the Orb of Distortion. She seems infatuated with Aizen, as shown by her anger at Aizen's interest in Orihime.

name: Lulu
description: __Height:__ 150cm A person who looks around 14-15-years-old who was inside a capsule-shaped machine used by Superbia. Smith rescued her from where she had washed up on shore. After that, she became fond of Smith and never wanted to leave his side. She speaks a unique language called "Gagapi" that sounds like mechanical sounds. She has a great fighting ability and her strength even overwhelms Smith.

name: Lye Batenkaitos
nativeName: ライ・バテンカイトス
description: Lye Batenkaitos is a Sin Archbishop of the Witch Cult, representing the gourmet aspect of gluttony. Lye is a short individual with long light brown hair, green eyes and teeth shaped like sharp fangs. He wears blue and purple clothes and a witch cult rope, but they are both very dirty and bloodstained. He also has attached daggers to his hands he received from the cult.

name: Mamori Tokonome
description: A high schooler forcibly sent to Mermaid Island after contracting the A-Virus. Mamori is a gentle girl who abhors violence. This puts her at odds with her ability to transform into a deadly weapon as an Extar. She is frequently teased over her family name being written with the same Kanji as "Virgin".

name: Mao
description: A young Chinese man who is also given the power of Geass, at the age of 6 by C.C. His Geass power differs from Lelouch's in that he has the ability to read the mind of other people without direct eye contact. Mao is mentally unstable and wears headphones that repeatedly play recorded words of encouragement and gratitude from C.C. during his younger days, who he pursues to see again.

name: Mari Kurokawa
description: Sergeant First Class of Japan Self-Defense Forces and one of the female members of Itami's Third Recon Team. She also serves as the team's medic, and usually speaks in a calm and reserved manner, but has shown to be sharp tongued when she thinks the situation warrants it.

name: Marlya Noel
description: A new recruit in "Dorothea," an organization dedicated to fighting Fairy-related crime and illegal activity. She is a special case who has the ability to control fairies without undergoing fairy organ implant surgery. Her village was burned down during the war, leaving her and her childhood friend Veronica as the sole survivors. name: Maya
description: Maya is an Iriomote cat (kitten actually) who the girls meet on their class trip to Okinawa on the Iriomote island. Surprisingly he seems to like Sakaki a lot. When Maya's mother dies he searches for Sakaki and eventually finds them and saves Sakaki and Chiyo from Kamineko and his gang. Chiyo then offers to keep Maya at her place until Sakaki moves out and is able to keep Maya at her own place - and Sakaki names the kitten Maya as an abbreviation of 'Yamamaya', a term used by Iriomote natives.
